# NORBILT — Licensed General Contractor, Clark County WA

NORBILT is a licensed, bonded, and insured general contractor serving Clark County, Washington. WA Contractor License: NORBIR**741CS. We serve Vancouver, Camas, Ridgefield, Battle Ground, Washougal, Brush Prairie, Felida, Hazel Dell, Salmon Creek, Five Corners, Orchards, Mill Plain, and Lake Shore.

## Services

- Handyman Services: https://www.norbilt.com/services/handyman
- Home Repair: https://www.norbilt.com/services/home-repair
- Drywall Repair: https://www.norbilt.com/services/drywall-repair
- Finish Carpentry: https://www.norbilt.com/services/finish-carpentry
- Kitchen & Bath Remodeling: https://www.norbilt.com/services/kitchen-bath
- Flooring Installation: https://www.norbilt.com/services/flooring
- Door & Window Services: https://www.norbilt.com/services/door-window
- Lighting Installation: https://www.norbilt.com/services/lighting

## Business Details

- Phone: (360) 216-9920
- Service Area: Clark County, WA (all cities)
- License: Washington State General Contractor, NORBIR**741CS
- Insurance: General liability on every job
- Estimates: Free, written, on-site — no charge, no obligation
- Pricing model: Flat rate per job, not hourly
